{{Aimai|まるつかこふん}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Maruzuka Kofun]] to [[Maruzuka Kofun (Jōyō)]]
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Maruzuka Kofun (Jōyō)]]

'''Maruzuka Kofun''' (丸塚古墳)
* {{ill|Maruzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke City)|ja|丸塚古墳 (下野市)}} - A burial mound located in {{ill|Shimotsuke City|ja|下野市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. Designated as a Tochigi Prefectural Historic Site. * {{ill|Maruzuka Kofun (Jōyō City)|ja|丸塚古墳 (城陽市)}} - A burial mound located in {{ill|Jōyō City|ja|城陽市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. Designated as a National Historic Site (part of the {{ill|Kuzugawa Burial Mounds|ja|久津川古墳群}}).
